activities_projects.title: Case Study of Mandal Commission Decision
activities_projects.objective: Understand how a major policy decision is made
steps: Read the section about the Mandal Commission decision
Identify the institutions involved in the decision
Write a short explanation of their roles
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains how government institutions participate in policy decisions

activities_projects.title: Parliamentary Functions Analysis
steps: List the major functions of Parliament
Give an example for each function
Discuss how Parliament controls the government
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyzes the role of Parliament in democracy

activities_projects.title: Mock Parliamentary Session
steps: Divide students into ruling party and opposition
Select a national issue
Conduct a mock parliamentary discussion

activities_projects.title: Executive Decision Making Chart
activities_projects.objective: Understand the working of the executive
steps: List the roles of the President, Prime Minister and Council of Ministers
Prepare a chart explaining their functions
Present the chart to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains the roles within the executive branch

activities_projects.title: Role of Prime Minister Report
activities_projects.objective: Study the powers of the Prime Minister
steps: Write a short report on the powers of the Prime Minister
Include examples of decision making
Explain why the Prime Minister is considered powerful
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Analyzes the importance of the Prime Minister in governance

activities_projects.title: Judicial Review Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of judicial review
steps: Read about judicial review in the chapter
Write its meaning
Give an example of how courts can declare a law invalid
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Explains the role of judiciary in protecting the Constitution

activities_projects.title: Hierarchy of Courts Presentation
steps: Prepare a diagram of the court hierarchy in India
Explain the role of each level of court
Present the diagram in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Describes the judicial structure of India

activities_projects.title: Newspaper Institutional Analysis
steps: Collect three news articles about government actions
Identify whether they relate to legislature, executive or judiciary
Write explanations for each
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects textbook concepts with real-life examples

activities_projects.title: Debate on Parliamentary vs Presidential System
steps: Divide the class into two groups
One group supports parliamentary system
The other supports presidential system
Conduct a debate

activities_projects.title: Institution Responsibility Table
steps: Prepare a table listing legislature, executive and judiciary
Write their main responsibilities
Provide one example for each
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands division of powers in democracy
